name: Aldani Basin
politics: The basin belongs to those who know the water.
Aldani avoid most outsiders but remember insults.
culture: Locals speak quietly on the water.
Fire, smoke and clean water are prized more than gold.
rumours: The lobster folk know where old treasures sank.
Something huge sleeps below the reeds.
A temple bell rings underwater during storms.
dmSecrets: Aldani may trade guidance for mercy or medicine.
A submerged ruin contains a clue to a greater route.
The water itself may carry cursed memories.
